ngl.def: 'Not gonna lie' — flags honesty or a mild confession.

iykyk.def: 'If you know, you know' — signals an inside reference.

fr.def: 'For real' — emphasises agreement. 'fr fr' = doubly so.

tfw.def: 'That feeling when' — sets up a relatable scenario.

tbh.def: 'To be honest' — prefaces a candid opinion.

fwiw.def: 'For what it's worth' — softens an opinion.

imo.def: 'In my opinion' — flags a personal take.

irl.def: 'In real life' — offline, as opposed to online.

tldr.def: 'Too long; didn't read' — a one-line summary.

atp.def: 'At this point' — introduces a resigned conclusion.

grwm.def: 'Get ready with me' — a video format.

sdiybt.def: An absurdist SpongeBob-derived phrase whose point is that it means nothing.

goat.def: 'Greatest of all time'. Often the goat emoji 🐐.

jomo.def: 'Joy of missing out' — smug opposite of FOMO.

dm.def: 'Direct message'. 'Slide into the DMs' = flirty private contact.

rt.def: 'Retweet' — now used in speech as 'I agree / same'.

l.def: A 'loss' or failure. 'Take the L' = accept defeat.

gg.def: 'Good game' — said at end of a match; loosely 'it's done'.

afk.def: 'Away from keyboard' — not at the screen; absent.

lowkey.def: Slightly, secretly, 'kind of'. Softens a statement.

unserious.def: Ridiculous, not to be taken seriously.

bet.def: 'Okay / deal / for sure' — an energetic agreement.

slay.def: To do something extremely well, or look amazing.

sus.def: Suspicious or shady. Popularised by Among Us.

stan.def: An obsessive superfan. From Eminem's song 'Stan'.

ghosting.def: Cutting off all contact suddenly and without explanation.

situationship.def: A romantic arrangement that refuses to define itself.

the ick.def: Sudden, irreversible feeling of repulsion toward someone you were attracted to.

rent-free.def: 'Living rent-free in my head' — you can't stop thinking about it.

based.def: Confidently yourself and indifferent to others' opinions.

cringe.def: Embarrassing second-hand discomfort. Opposite of based.

hits different.def: Feels uniquely better in this context.

touch grass.def: 'Log off and go outside' — telling someone they're too online.

main character.def: Acting like the protagonist of the world.

side eye.def: A look of suspicion or judgement.

era.def: A self-defined life phase: 'in my villain era'.

cooking.def: Doing something impressively well: 'let him cook'.

ratio.def: When a reply outperforms the post it answers.

ate.def: Did something exceptionally well. 'Ate and left no crumbs'.

fell off.def: Declined in quality or relevance from a former peak.

gaslight.def: Manipulating someone into doubting their own reality.

it's giving.def: 'It's giving [X]' — it has the vibe of X.

pull up.def: To show up or come through.

rizz.def: Charisma — now graveyarded; using it sincerely is a dead giveaway you're a millennial.

sigma.def: A 'lone wolf' male archetype, now mostly ironic.

skibidi.def: A mood-dependent intensifier from Skibidi Toilet.

yeet.def: To throw something with force. Firmly dated now.

cheugy.def: Off-trend in a millennial way. The word itself has become cheugy.

mewing.def: Now meme shorthand for staying silent. 'I'm just mewing'.

crash out.def: To lose emotional control spectacularly. Defining term of 2025-26.

clanker.def: Derogatory term for AI, robots, or AI-reliant people.

ai slop.def: Low-effort, mass-produced AI content flooding feeds.

shrekking.def: Dating someone you're not attracted to hoping they'll treat you well.

i know ball.def: 'I deeply understand this and have elite taste.'

beige flag.def: A partner trait that's neither good nor bad, just oddly boring.

brain rot.def: The mushy-brain feeling from too much absurd internet content. Oxford WOTY 2024.

aura farming.def: Sincere usage is officially graveyarded — what survives is the joke.

six seven.def: '6-7' — nonsense audio meme. Officially graveyarded in middle schools.

looksmaxxing.def: Peak-phase obsession now graveyarded; the manosphere has moved on.

mogging.def: Visibly outshining someone in looks or presence.

sneaky link.def: A secret romantic meetup, or the person you're secretly seeing.

body count.def: The number of people someone has slept with.

thirst trap.def: A deliberately attractive photo posted for attention.

ragebait.def: Content posted purely to provoke angry reactions.

edgelord.def: Someone who performs shock value for attention.

micro-drama.def: Ultra-short serialized vertical video soap operas.

great meme reset.def: A 2026 movement calling for a return to nostalgic, human-made memes.

nihilistic penguin.def: A penguin from a 2007 documentary marching alone toward mountains — 2026 mascot of opting out.

kitkat heist.def: Memes about the real 2026 theft of ~400,000 KitKat bars.

i am my perimeter.def: A streamer's deadpan R6 line turned all-purpose 'locked in' declaration.

material lover.def: Soundtrack reference to Sienna Spiro's Devil Wears Prada 2 song — fashion/aspirational audio.

remember who you are.def: Reels caption format over 'Freakin' Out' — travel, training, glow-up montages.

saxophone gets louder.def: Audio format where sax music swells as on-screen chaos collapses.

banger badge.def: X's 'Certified Banger' badge — became a meme within hours.

analog posting.def: Posting deliberately low-tech content as anti-AI-slop signalling.

💀.def: Skull = 'I'm dead' — something is so funny you've metaphorically died laughing.

😭.def: Rarely actual crying — usually 'this is hilarious'.

🧢.def: The cap = a lie. Reply '🧢' to call cap.

🗿.def: The moai = deadpan, stoic, ironic 'sigma' energy.

🤡.def: The clown = self-own or calling someone foolish.

🐐.def: The goat = GOAT, greatest of all time.

🥀.def: Wilted rose = melodramatic heartbreak or ironic despair.

👁️👄👁️.def: Wide eyes and lips = stunned witnessing of chaos.

pageText: ngl the kitkat heist memes are lowkey the best thing on my fyp all week 💀 whoever stole 400k chocolate bars said it's giving canon event, no cap. half the replies are clanker accounts posting ai slop tho, istg the great meme reset can't come soon enough. anyway the nihilistic penguin understood the assignment — he saw the discourse and chose the mountains, and tbh? based. atp I'm just mewing.
examples: bro really crashed out over his choppelganger, -1000 aura, he's so 404 coded 💀
ngl the kitkat heist memes are cooking, no cap that's a canon event fr
she's shrekking him atp, beige flag after beige flag, istg i know ball when i see it
